title: crotalaria multiflora var. kurisumalayana
intro: Crotalaria multiflora var. kurisumalayana, also known as Kurisumalayana, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
